testcase.name: Email satisfies all blocking constraints — registration is allowed
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Email satisfies all blocking constraints — registration is allowed &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-register.feature:15&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma valid email &amp#27;[1m"user@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.aValidEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration eligibility is evaluated&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationEligibilityIsEvaluated()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mregistration is allowed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationIsAllowed()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Domain has no MX record — registration is allowed with a warning
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Domain has no MX record — registration is allowed with a warning &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-register.feature:33&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma valid email &amp#27;[1m"user@ghost-domain.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.aValidEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1m"ghost-domain.com"&amp#27;[22m has no MX record&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.hasNoMxRecord(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration eligibility is evaluated with active constraints&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationEligibilityIsEvaluatedWithActiveConstraints()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mregistration is allowed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationIsAllowed()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22ma warning &amp#27;[1m"NO_MX_RECORD"&amp#27;[22m is raised&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.aWarningIsRaised(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Email violates a blocking constraint — registration is rejected &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-register.feature:28&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22man email &amp#27;[1m"user space@test.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.anEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1m"-"&amp#27;[22m is configured as a &amp#27;[1m"-"&amp#27;[22m domain&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.isConfiguredAsTypedDomain(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration eligibility is evaluated with active constraints&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationEligibilityIsEvaluatedWithActiveConstraints()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mregistration is rejected with violation &amp#27;[1m"RFC_FORMAT_INVALID"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationIsRejectedWithViolation(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Email violates a blocking constraint — registration is rejected &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-register.feature:29&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22man email &amp#27;[1m"user@mailinator.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.anEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1m"mailinator.com"&amp#27;[22m is configured as a &amp#27;[1m"disposable"&amp#27;[22m domain&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.isConfiguredAsTypedDomain(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration eligibility is evaluated with active constraints&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationEligibilityIsEvaluatedWithActiveConstraints()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mregistration is rejected with violation &amp#27;[1m"DISPOSABLE_DOMAIN"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationIsRejectedWithViolation(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Example #1.3
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Email violates a blocking constraint — registration is rejected &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-register.feature:30&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22man email &amp#27;[1m"user@spammer.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.anEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1m"spammer.com"&amp#27;[22m is configured as a &amp#27;[1m"blacklisted"&amp#27;[22m domain&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.isConfiguredAsTypedDomain(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration eligibility is evaluated with active constraints&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationEligibilityIsEvaluatedWithActiveConstraints()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mregistration is rejected with violation &amp#27;[1m"DOMAIN_BLOCKED"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationIsRejectedWithViolation(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Example #1.4
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario Outline:&amp#27;[22m Email violates a blocking constraint — registration is rejected &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-register.feature:31&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22man email &amp#27;[1m"user@gmail.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.anEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1m"acme.com"&amp#27;[22m is configured as a &amp#27;[1m"company-only"&amp#27;[22m domain&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.isConfiguredAsTypedDomain(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mregistration eligibility is evaluated with active constraints&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationEligibilityIsEvaluatedWithActiveConstraints()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mregistration is rejected with violation &amp#27;[1m"NOT_A_COMPANY_DOMAIN"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.registrationIsRejectedWithViolation(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Valid email can request a password reset
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Valid email can request a password reset &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-reset-password.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma valid email &amp#27;[1m"user@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.aValidEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mpassword reset eligibility is evaluated&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.passwordResetEligibilityIsEvaluated()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpassword reset is allowed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.passwordResetIsAllowed()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Malformed email cannot request a password reset
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Malformed email cannot request a password reset &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-reset-password.feature:8&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22man email with invalid format &amp#27;[1m"user space@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.anEmailWithInvalidFormat(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mpassword reset eligibility is evaluated&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.passwordResetEligibilityIsEvaluated()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpassword reset is rejected with violation &amp#27;[1m"RFC_FORMAT_INVALID"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.passwordResetIsRejectedWithViolation(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Email from a blacklisted domain cannot request a password reset
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Email from a blacklisted domain cannot request a password reset &amp#27;[90m# classpath:com/jrobertgardzinski/email/policy/can-reset-password.feature:13&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma valid email &amp#27;[1m"user@spammer.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.aValidEmail(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[1m"spammer.com"&amp#27;[22m is a &amp#27;[1m"blacklisted"&amp#27;[22m domain&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.isATypedDomain(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mpassword reset eligibility is evaluated with extended checks&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.passwordResetEligibilityIsEvaluatedWithExtendedChecks()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mpassword reset is rejected with violation &amp#27;[1m"DOMAIN_BLOCKED"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.jrobertgardzinski.email.policy.EmailPolicySteps.passwordResetIsRejectedWithViolation(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
